data.name: My Sadistic Princess Is My Roommate
data.detailed_description:
In the middle of the Pacific, there exists a remote island home to the Kingdom of Juori. The Kingdom of Juori has a society where all men are slaves to women. You were born on the same day as Crown Princess Emiko Ruya, and was therefore assigned to be her slave from birth. 21 Years later, now that Emiko has come of age, she has been sent to a university in Japan under an alias to study and learn the customs of the outside world. And as her slave, you followed her. For Emiko, pretending to be a commoner is hard work, and as she's done her entire life, she uses you as a punching bag and releases all of her pent up stress and anger on you in the privacy of her room, the only place where she can act as her true sadistic self. However, she might not be as sadistic as you thought

  • ~7.5K words

  • Kinetic Novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 25 Unique character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game
data.about_the_game:
In the middle of the Pacific, there exists a remote island home to the Kingdom of Juori. The Kingdom of Juori has a society where all men are slaves to women. You were born on the same day as Crown Princess Emiko Ruya, and was therefore assigned to be her slave from birth. 21 Years later, now that Emiko has come of age, she has been sent to a university in Japan under an alias to study and learn the customs of the outside world. And as her slave, you followed her. For Emiko, pretending to be a commoner is hard work, and as she's done her entire life, she uses you as a punching bag and releases all of her pent up stress and anger on you in the privacy of her room, the only place where she can act as her true sadistic self. However, she might not be as sadistic as you thought

  • ~7.5K words

  • Kinetic Novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 25 Unique character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game
data.short_description: As usual, your sadistic princess mercilessly teases and bullies you for her own sadistic pleasure. However, she might not be as sadistic as you once thought...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
